basic_details.job_title: MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal
basic_details.short_information: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (MANIT Bhopal) has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 1 JRF Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on at the MANIT Bhopal office with original documents and self-attested copies.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduation Degree in Basic Sciences OR Graduation Degree in Professional Courses (Engineering)
qualification.details: Post Graduation Degree in Basic Sciences OR Graduation Degree in Professional Courses (Engineering)

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for MANIT Bhopal JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the JRF post at MANIT Bhopal is scheduled for 15 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The required qualification is a Post Graduation Degree in Basic Sciences or a Graduation Degree in Professional Courses (Engineering).

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the JRF position is 30 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 20,000.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the JRF role at MANIT Bhopal?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this JRF position?
faq.answer: The JRF position is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the MANIT Bhopal office.

faq.question: Q10. Does MANIT Bhopal offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify details regarding age relaxation for reserved categories. It is advisable to check the official notification for this information.
